name: Multiple Immunofluorescence Protocol (FFPE & Frozen)
nameCn: 多重免疫荧光染色方案（石蜡切片及冰冻切片）

usage.en: Multiplex immunofluorescence staining of FFPE or frozen tissue sections with multiple primary antibodies and fluorochrome-conjugated secondaries in a single tissue section.
usage.zh: FFPE 或冰冻切片的多重免疫荧光染色方案，在同一组织切片上使用多种一抗和荧光标记二抗。

materials.name: Citrate unmasking buffer (10 mM sodium citrate pH 6.0)
Antibody dilution buffer: 1% BSA + 0.3% Triton X-100 in PBS
Blocking buffer: 5% normal goat serum in TBST

components.name: Section A — FFPE Deparaffinize: 3×5 min xylene → 2×5 min 100% EtOH → 5 min 95% → 1 min 70% → 1 min 50% → 2×5 min dH₂O.
Section B — Antigen Unmasking: Place in citrate buffer pH 6.0. Pressure cooker: 95°C 30 min (slow cook, vent open), then 115°C 1 min (close vent). Cool ≥30 min before opening.

note.en: For frozen fixed tissue: rewarm 20 min RT, then go to staining. For unfixed frozen: fix with 4% PFA 15 min, wash 3×5 min TBST.
note.zh: 冰冻固定组织：室温复温 20 分钟后直接染色。未固定冰冻：4% PFA 固定 15 分钟，TBST 洗 3×5 分钟。

components.name: Section C Step 1: Wash in dH₂O 5 min.
Step 2: Draw rectangle around tissue with liquid blocker pen.
Step 4: Block with 100–200 µL blocking buffer for 1 h.

note.en: Choose blocking serum from host species of secondary antibody (e.g. goat serum for goat anti-rabbit/mouse secondaries).
note.zh: 封闭血清选二抗的宿主（如山羊二抗用山羊血清封闭）。

components.name: Step 5: Apply 100 µL primary antibody mixture (in antibody dilution buffer) overnight at 4°C in dark humid box.
Step 7: Apply 100 µL fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody mixture, 1–2 h at RT in dark.
Step 9 (if using conjugated primary Ab): After secondary staining, incubate conjugated primary antibody 1–2 h RT in dark, then wash 3×5 min TBST.
Step 10: Aspirate liquid outside tissue. Apply 20 µL anti-fade mounting medium along rectangle margin. Carefully place coverslip (avoid bubbles). Seal with nail polish.
Step 11: Image after ≥4 h. Best results: cure overnight at RT. Long-term storage: 4°C protected from light.

detailedSteps.zh: **第一天 — 脱蜡、抗原修复与一抗孵育**

detailedSteps.en: (FFPE only) Deparaffinize slides: 3×5 min xylene → 2×5 min 100% ethanol → 5 min 95% → 1 min 70% → 1 min 50% → 2×5 min dH₂O.
detailedSteps.zh: （仅石蜡切片）脱蜡：3×5 min 二甲苯 → 2×5 min 100% 乙醇 → 5 min 95% → 1 min 70% → 1 min 50% → 2×5 min 蒸馏水。

detailedSteps.en: Antigen unmasking: submerge slides in citrate buffer pH 6.0. Pressure cooker: 95°C 30 min (vent open), then 115°C 1 min (close vent). Cool ≥30 min at RT. For frozen sections: rewarm 20 min RT; if unfixed, fix 4% PFA 15 min then wash 3×5 min TBST.
detailedSteps.zh: 抗原修复：载玻片浸入柠檬酸缓冲液 pH 6.0。压力锅：95°C 30 min（通风口开放），115°C 1 min（关闭通风口）。室温冷却 ≥30 min。冰冻切片：RT 复温 20 min；未固定切片先 4% PFA 固定 15 min 再 TBST 洗 3×5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Wash in dH₂O 5 min. Draw hydrophobic barrier around tissue with PAP pen. Wash 2×5 min in TBST.
detailedSteps.zh: 蒸馏水洗 5 min。PAP 笔在组织周围画疏水屏障。TBST 洗 2×5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Block with 100–200 µL blocking buffer (5% normal goat serum in TBST) for 1 h at RT in humidity chamber. Do not wash after blocking.
detailedSteps.zh: 封闭液（5% 山羊血清/TBST）100–200 µL 封闭 1 h，RT，湿盒中。封闭后不洗。

detailedSteps.en: Apply 100 µL primary antibody mixture (diluted in 1% BSA + 0.3% Triton X-100 in PBS) to each section. Incubate overnight at 4°C in dark humidity chamber.
detailedSteps.zh: 每个切片加 100 µL 一抗混合液（1% BSA + 0.3% Triton X-100/PBS 稀释）。4°C 避光湿盒中过夜孵育。
**第二天 — 二抗、封片与成像**

detailedSteps.en: Remove primary antibody. Wash 3×5 min in TBST.
Apply 100 µL fluorochrome-conjugated secondary antibody mixture (1:200–1:500 in blocking buffer). Incubate 1–2 h at RT in the dark.
detailedSteps.zh: 加 100 µL 荧光标记二抗混合液（封闭液 1:200–1:500 稀释）。RT 避光孵育 1–2 h。

detailedSteps.en: (Optional) If using directly conjugated primary antibodies: apply after secondary staining, 1–2 h RT in dark, wash 3×5 min TBST.
detailedSteps.zh: （可选）如使用直接标记一抗：二抗后加入，RT 避光 1–2 h，TBST 洗 3×5 min。

detailedSteps.en: Aspirate excess liquid. Apply 20 µL anti-fade mounting medium along tissue margin. Place coverslip carefully (avoid bubbles). Seal edges with nail polish.
detailedSteps.zh: 吸去多余液体。沿组织边缘加 20 µL 抗淬灭封片剂。小心放置盖玻片（避免气泡）。指甲油封边。

detailedSteps.en: Allow mounting medium to cure ≥4 h (overnight best) at RT in the dark before imaging. Store long-term at 4°C protected from light.
detailedSteps.zh: 封片剂 RT 避光固化 ≥4 h（过夜最佳）后成像。长期保存 4°C 避光。

briefSteps.en: Deparaffinize (FFPE) → Antigen retrieval (citrate pH 6.0, pressure cooker) → Block 1 h → Primary Ab mixture O/N 4°C → Wash → Secondary Ab 1–2 h RT → Wash → (Optional: conjugated primary Ab) → Mount with anti-fade → Image
briefSteps.zh: 脱蜡（石蜡切片）→ 抗原修复（柠檬酸 pH 6.0 压力锅）→ 封闭 1 h → 一抗混合液 4°C 过夜 → 洗涤 → 二抗 1–2 h RT → 洗涤 →（可选：直标一抗）→ 抗淬灭封片 → 成像

note.en: Primary antibody incubation is an overnight step at 4°C — required pause
note.zh: 一抗 4°C 过夜孵育——必需的暂停步骤

note.en: Mounted slides can be stored at 4°C protected from light for weeks
note.zh: 封片后的载玻片可 4°C 避光保存数周

note.en: After antigen retrieval and rehydration, slides can be held in TBST at RT for up to 30 min
note.zh: 抗原修复和复水后，载玻片可在 TBST 中 RT 保存最多 30 min

notes.en: Panel design: ensure primary antibodies are from different host species (or use directly conjugated primaries). Match secondary antibodies to primary host species. Cannot use goat serum blocking if a primary antibody is raised in goat. Do not let sections dry at any point — use humid box with water during all incubations.
notes.zh: 面板设计：确保一抗来自不同宿主（或使用直接标记一抗）。二抗与一抗宿主匹配。一抗是山羊来源时不能用山羊血清封闭。整个过程切勿让切片干燥——所有孵育使用加水的避光湿盒。

ref: Adapted from Cell Signaling Technology IF Guide; multiplex IF best practices (2019)
